intro: Isachne trachysperma is a type of perennial grass native to tropical regions, commonly known as a medicinal plant. The leaves of Isachne trachysperma have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Isachne trachysperma include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. Herbal preparations made from Isachne trachysperma, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, are commonly used to treat respiratory conditions, as well as to promote overall well-being and immune system function.
